title: Orbital Contribution
description: What each agent produces per round — typed findings, artifacts, cross-references, and self-review results.

agent_function.description: Which orbital function produced this contribution

investigation_brief_ref.description: Reference to the investigation track from the roster that this contribution addresses

round.description: Which round of investigation (1 = initial, 2+ = post-review revisions)

type.description: What kind of signal this finding represents

content.description: The finding itself — must explain WHY it matters

source.description: Where this finding came from — data source, analysis method, prototype test

assumptions_addressed.description: Which opportunity assumptions this finding addresses

direction.description: Does this finding support or challenge the opportunity

self_checked.description: Did the agent self-check against quality criteria before submitting?

self_check_notes.description: What the agent noted during self-check

reviewer.description: Which reviewer agent reviewed this contribution (populated after independent review)

review_passed.description: Did the independent review pass? (populated after independent review)

review_feedback.description: Reviewer's feedback on the contribution (populated after independent review)

revisions_made.description: What changed based on review feedback (populated after revision round)

self_review.description: Two-step review: agent self-checks (required on initial write), then dedicated reviewer provides independent review (populated after review)
